row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward movement along a city street with slight rightward drift.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Vehicles ahead maintain forward trajectories; pedestrians on the right cross or stand near the curb.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene during daytime with clear visibility. Multiple lanes, traffic lights, parked and moving vehicles, construction zones, and pedestrians are visible.
semantic.visibility_notes: All key objects are clearly visible with no significant occlusion or blur. Scene structure is coherent and stable across frames.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Objects move smoothly over time without abrupt jumps or disappearances. Ego vehicle progresses steadily forward.
logical.object_continuity: Vehicles and pedestrians remain continuously visible unless partially occluded by perspective or distance. No ghosting or duplication observed.
logical.structure_continuity: Road layout, buildings, and infrastructure remain consistent in position and shape throughout the sequence.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward at moderate speed, following lane alignment.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards detected. Pedestrians are on sidewalks or crossing safely; traffic flow appears orderly.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban street scene but with noticeable degradation in object clarity and structural fidelity. Some elements appear distorted or missing.
key_objects: pedestrians (less distinct, some missing limbs or faces)
traffic_elements: traffic lights (may flicker or change color unnaturally)
semantic.visibility_notes: Many objects suffer from blurring, edge distortion, or partial disappearance. Pedestrian features are often indistinct. Road boundaries occasionally shift unexpectedly.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Some objects exhibit jittery motion or sudden appearance/disappearance. Trajectories of vehicles and pedestrians show minor instability compared to Row 1.
logical.object_continuity: Certain objects vanish briefly or reappear with altered geometry. Pedestrians sometimes lose body parts or merge with background.
logical.structure_continuity: Building facades and road structures show warping or snapping between frames. Lane lines may drift or break discontinuously.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle still moves forward, but path stability is reduced due to visual artifacts affecting perception of lane boundaries.
decision.risk_context: Reduced scene readability may impair downstream decision-making. Potential for misjudging pedestrian positions or obstacle distances due to artifact-induced ambiguity.

preserved_elements: presence of major vehicles and pedestrians
